name: Imgproxy
description: Imgproxy — Fast self-hostable image processing proxy with URL-based resize, crop, and format conversion.

seo.title: Imgproxy — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Imgproxy: Imgproxy — Fast self-hostable image processing proxy with URL-based resize, crop, and format conversion.

when_to_use: Self-hosted image resizing and format conversion via URL params
On-the-fly WebP/AVIF conversion without managed service costs
Image processing proxy in front of S3 or local storage
Secure image URLs with signed processing via imgproxy
Replacing Cloudinary with a privacy-first self-hosted option

pros: Blazing fast Go binary, low memory footprint
URL signing prevents abuse by default
cons: You run the ops, scaling, and monitoring
No built-in CDN, needs pairing with one
review.verdict: Best self-hosted image proxy for engineering teams willing to own infrastructure and avoid per-transform billing.
review.best_for: Engineering teams at scale wanting cost control over image processing infra
review.not_for: Small teams who prefer managed SaaS with zero ops responsibility
